Petition To Cotrustee To Construe Trust And To Instruct Costrustee To Make Discretionary Distributio
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Advanced From Aug-17-09 To Jun-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioner Herbert W Yanowitz'S Motion To File Documents Under Seal And To Seal Transcripts Of Hearing, Court Orders, And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Advanced From Aug-13-09 To Jun-08-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Cotrustee To Construe Trust And To Instruct Costrustee To Make Discretionary Distributio
Off Calendar Jun-10-2009 Off Calendar

Petitioner Herbert W Yanowitz'S Motion To File Documents Under Seal And To Seal Transcripts Of Hearing, Court Orders, And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Natacha Ivacheff-Kolb for Wells Fargo Bank. Neil Horton for and with Herbert Yanowitz (Co-Trustee).

There was no oppostion on behalf of Wells Fargo Bank. Mr. Horton presented oral argument to support his position. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time And Advance Hearing Date Of Petition To Construe Trust And To Instruct Cotrustee To Make Discretionary Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
